title: Baldis Basics
description: Add the baldis basics item from plus verison in minecraft
body:
![Almost all items from the resource pack are shown here.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e99c0174f1a16d93d25fc78dfcd87131cf836026.png)**(WARNING: THIS RESOURCE PACK HAS ALTERED LOUD SOUNDS)**
This is a (partially) PvP resource pack that replaces Minecraft items with items from the game Baldi's Basics Plus. 
Changes: The golden carrot has now been replaced with a candy bar. The golden and enchanted apples have now been replaced with BSOD and Diet BSOD. The totem has been replaced with Baldi's face. (WARNING: WHEN THE TOTEM IS TRIGGERED, THERE WILL BE A VERY LOUD SOUND.) The Ender Pearl has now been replaced with the Teleporter from the same game.
